section.heading: Civil actions by Attorney General; notice of violations; certification respecting undertaking appropriate remedial action
section.chapeau: The Attorney General shall not institute a civil action under section 1706 of this title before he—

subsection.content: gives to the appropriate educational agency notice of the condition or conditions which, in his judgment, constitute a violation of part 2 of this subchapter; and

certifies to the appropriate district court of the United States that he is satisfied that such educational agency has not, within a reasonable time after such notice, undertaken appropriate remedial action.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on and after sixtieth day after Aug. 21, 1974, see section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380, set out as a note under section 1221–1 of this title.
